mapper.insert: insert into tbl_bookmark (member_id, post_id, folder_id) values (#{memberId}, #{postId}, #{folderId})
mapper.delete: delete from tbl_bookmark where member_id = #{memberId} and post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: select b.id, b.member_id, b.post_id, b.folder_id, b.created_datetime, p.title as postTitle, p.content as postContent from tbl_bookmark b join tbl_post p on b.post_id = p.id where b.member_id = #{memberId} order by b.created_datetime desc

select b.id, b.member_id, b.post_id, b.folder_id, b.created_datetime, p.title as postTitle, p.content as postContent from tbl_bookmark b join tbl_post p on b.post_id = p.id where b.folder_id = #{folderId} order by b.created_datetime desc

select b.id, b.member_id, b.post_id, b.folder_id, b.created_datetime, p.title as postTitle, p.content as postContent from tbl_bookmark b join tbl_post p on b.post_id = p.id where b.member_id = #{memberId} and b.folder_id is null order by b.created_datetime desc
select count(*) from tbl_bookmark where member_id = #{memberId}
